meaning: n.同性恋者adj.奇怪的,可疑的,不舒服的vt.搞糟n.同性恋者
examples: His face was a queer pink colour.
If you ask me, there's something kind of queer going on.
You made me feel quite queer.
"She is eccentric and indulges in queer food and queer clothes, " he told officers.
One fact is that many, many queer people in USA were indeed raised in religious homes.
